description:
Create a new tax entry in the Ekylibre instance at http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000 using the following parameters: Name: "TVA Réduite Alimentaire 5.5%", Rate: 5.5%, Nature: Normal VAT, and Country: France. Assign available VAT-related accounts (starting with 445...) to the collect and deduction account fields. 

Login credentials:
- Email: admin@ekylibre.org
- Password: 12345678
